name: Sour Cream Corn Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the corn, sour cream, eggs, and corn oil in a large bowl. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly incorporated.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the corn meal and baking powder. Stir into the corn mixture until just combined.
3. Pour the batter into a greased 10-inch iron skillet.
4. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes or until golden brown.
5. Note: This bread pairs well with vegetable or bean soup.
